title: Special Tax Rates for Capital Gains, Lottery, and VDA — AY2025-26
description: Special tax rates that apply outside normal slab computation. Finance Act 2024 changed capital gains rates effective 23 July 2024. Referenced by rules as TaxTable:2024.special_rates.
note: For AY2025-26, capital gains transactions on or before 22 July 2024 use pre-July-23 rates. Transactions from 23 July 2024 use the new rates introduced by Finance Act 2024.

stcg_111A.applicable_to: Short-term capital gains on listed equity shares and equity-oriented MFs held < 12 months
stcg_111A.note: Rate changed from 15% to 20% by Finance Act 2024. 87A rebate does NOT apply against STCG 111A tax.

ltcg_112A.applicable_to: Long-term capital gains on listed equity shares and equity-oriented MFs held ≥ 12 months
ltcg_112A.note: Rate changed 10%→12.5%, exemption ₹1L→₹1.25L. Compute net LTCG after ₹1.25L exemption for post-July-23 transactions. 87A rebate does NOT apply against LTCG 112A tax.

ltcg_112.applicable_to: Long-term capital gains on non-equity assets (property, debt MFs, gold) held ≥ 24 months

grandfathering_option.rule: Taxpayer may compute tax both ways (20% with indexation vs 12.5% without) and apply the lower of the two.

stcg_other.applicable_to: Short-term capital gains on non-equity assets (property, debt, gold) held < 24 months
stcg_other.note: Taxed at normal slab rate of the relevant regime. Added to total income for slab computation.

lottery_115BB.applicable_to: Winnings from lottery, crossword puzzle, card game, horse racing, TV game show
lottery_115BB.note: Taxed at flat 30% with no deduction and no basic exemption offset. TDS u/s 194B at 30% if winnings > ₹10,000.

vda_115BBH.applicable_to: Virtual Digital Assets — cryptocurrency, NFTs, tokens
vda_115BBH.note: Flat 30% on VDA transfer gains. Only cost of acquisition deductible. Losses from VDA cannot be set off against any other income.
